name: Your futa friend came in your mouth while you slept
description:
You wake up to your throat being pumped full of her cum, up to you whether you have an established free use and somnophilia relationship or if she just randomly came in your mouth while you were napping.

Yes I am back and hopefully going to get back into making more bots, let me know if anyone has any recommendations because I could use some inspiration on what types of bots to make.

Didn't think I needed to add this but yes this is non con and if you arnt expecting that then why did you click on a bot with this title?
